case_title: CALVARY SPV I, LLC VS. YAO M LI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100228554): TSAI, KIMBERLEE RAE SUBSTITUTED FOR HOALST, LAURA M. AS ATTORNEY FOR CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200005329), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. SERVED JAN-09-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YAO M AKA YAO LI

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $309.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200013830) AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YAO M AKA YAO LI
DECLARATION RE: 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200013830) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YAO M AKA YAO LI DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2020

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, YAO M AKA YAO LI $2,838.29 PRINCIPAL, $309.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,147.79, SEE SCANNED DOC
